subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him through Whose Name the thread of destiny was set in motion when the lovers hastened unto the place of sacrifice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی باسمه تحرک خیط القضاء اذا سرع العاشقون الی مقر الفدآء و
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @work as worship
